questions.text_en: Were you energetic?
questions.text_zh: 您精力充沛吗？

questions.text_en: Did you get tired easily?
questions.text_zh: 您容易疲乏吗？

questions.text_en: Did you experience shortness of breath?
questions.text_zh: 您容易气短（呼吸短促，接不上气）吗？

questions.text_en: Did you get palpitations?
questions.text_zh: 您容易心慌吗？

questions.text_en: Did you get dizzy easily or become dizzy when standing up?
questions.text_zh: 您容易头晕或站起时晕眩吗？

questions.text_en: Did you prefer quietness and not like to talk?
questions.text_zh: 您喜欢安静，懒得说话吗？

questions.text_en: Was your voice weak when talking?
questions.text_zh: 您说话声音低弱无力吗？

questions.text_en: Did you feel in low spirits and depressed?
questions.text_zh: 您感到闷闷不乐、情绪低沉吗？

questions.text_en: Did you easily feel anxious and worried?
questions.text_zh: 您容易精神紧张、焦虑不安吗？

questions.text_en: Did you feel overly sensitive, vulnerable or emotionally upset?
questions.text_zh: 您多愁善感、感情脆弱吗？

questions.text_en: Were you easily scared or frightened?
questions.text_zh: 您容易感到害怕（受惊吓）吗？

questions.text_en: Did you experience distention in the underarm or breast?
questions.text_zh: 您胁肋部或乳房胀痛吗？

questions.text_en: Did you feel chest or abdominal stuffiness?
questions.text_zh: 您感到胸闷或腹部胀满吗？

questions.text_en: Did you sigh without reason?
questions.text_zh: 您无缘无故叹气吗？

questions.text_en: Did your body feel heavy or lethargic?
questions.text_zh: 您感到身体沉重不轻松或不爽快吗？

questions.text_en: Did the palms of your hands or soles of your feet feel hot?
questions.text_zh: 您手脚心发热吗？

questions.text_en: Did your hands or feet feel cold or clammy?
questions.text_zh: 您手脚发凉吗？

questions.text_en: Did you feel cold easily in your abdomen, back, lower back or knees?
questions.text_zh: 您胃脘部、背部或腰膝部怕冷吗？

questions.text_en: Were you sensitive to cold and tended to wear more clothes than others?
questions.text_zh: 您比一般人耐受不了寒冷（冬天的寒冷，夏天的冷空调、电扇等）吗？

questions.text_en: Did your body and face feel hot?
questions.text_zh: 您感到身体、脸上发热吗？

questions.text_en: Did you feel more vulnerable to the cold than others?
questions.text_zh: 您比一般人受不了寒冷吗？

questions.text_en: Did you catch colds more easily than others?
questions.text_zh: 您容易患感冒吗？

questions.text_en: Did you sneeze even when you did not have a cold?
questions.text_zh: 您没有感冒时也会打喷嚏吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have a runny or stuffy nose even when you did not have a cold?
questions.text_zh: 您没有感冒时也会鼻塞、流鼻涕吗？

questions.text_en: Did you cough due to seasonal or temperature changes?
questions.text_zh: 您因季节变化、温度变化或异味等原因而咳喘吗？

questions.text_en: Did you sweat easily when physical activity increased slightly?
questions.text_zh: 您容易出虚汗吗？

questions.text_en: Did you forget things easily?
questions.text_zh: 您容易忘事（健忘）吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have an excessively oily forehead and/or T-zone?
questions.text_zh: 您前额部或鼻部有油腻感或者油亮发光吗？

questions.text_en: Were your lips redder than in the past?
questions.text_zh: 您口唇的颜色比一般人红吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have allergies?
questions.text_zh: 您有药物、食物、气味、花粉等过敏吗？

questions.text_en: Did you get hives/urticaria easily?
questions.text_zh: 您容易起荨麻疹（风团、风疹块）吗？

questions.text_en: Did your skin have purpura due to allergies?
questions.text_zh: 您的皮肤容易起紫癜（瘀斑）吗？

questions.text_en: Did black or purple bruises appear on your skin for no reason?
questions.text_zh: 您的皮肤在不知不觉中会出现青紫瘀斑吗？

questions.text_en: Did your skin turn red and show traces when you scratched it?
questions.text_zh: 您的皮肤一抓就红，并出现抓痕吗？

questions.text_en: Did your skin or lips feel dry?
questions.text_zh: 您皮肤或口唇干吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have visible capillary veins on your cheeks?
questions.text_zh: 您两颧部有细微红丝吗？

questions.text_en: Did you feel pain somewhere in your body?
questions.text_zh: 您身体上有哪里疼痛吗？

questions.text_en: Did your eyes feel dry?
questions.text_zh: 您感到眼睛干涩吗？

questions.text_en: Did your nose or face feel greasy, oily, or shiny?
questions.text_zh: 您感到鼻后头或面部有油腻感吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have a dark face or get brown spots easily?
questions.text_zh: 您面色晦黯或容易出现褐斑吗？

questions.text_en: Did you get acne or sores easily?
questions.text_zh: 您容易生痤疮或疮疖吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have upper eyelid swelling?
questions.text_zh: 您上眼睑比别人肿（上眼睑有轻微隆起现象）吗？

questions.text_en: Did you get dark circles under the eyes easily?
questions.text_zh: 您有黑眼圈吗？

questions.text_en: Did you often feel parched and need to drink water?
questions.text_zh: 您容易口燥、咽干、总想喝水吗？

questions.text_en: Were your lips darker, more blue or purple than usual?
questions.text_zh: 您口唇颜色偏黯吗？

questions.text_en: Did you often feel parched and need to drink water?
questions.text_zh: 您感到口干咽燥、总想喝水吗？

questions.text_en: Did your throat feel strange (lump in throat)?
questions.text_zh: 您感到咽喉部有异物感吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have a bitter or strange taste in your mouth?
questions.text_zh: 您感到口苦或嘴里有异味吗？

questions.text_en: Did your mouth feel sticky?
questions.text_zh: 您感到口黏腻或有甜感吗？

questions.text_en: Was your abdomen flabby?
questions.text_zh: 您腹部肥满松软吗？

questions.text_en: Did you have an abundance of phlegm in your throat?
questions.text_zh: 您感到痰多吗？

questions.text_en: Did cold food or drink make you uncomfortable?
questions.text_zh: 您吃（喝）凉的东西会感到不舒服或怕吃（喝）吗？

questions.text_en: Could you adapt to environmental changes?
questions.text_zh: 您适应外界自然和社会环境的变化吗？

questions.text_en: Did you easily experience insomnia?
questions.text_zh: 您容易失眠吗？

questions.text_en: Did you easily get diarrhea when exposed to cold?
questions.text_zh: 您受凉或吃（喝）凉的东西后，容易腹泻吗？

questions.text_en: Did you pass sticky stools?
questions.text_zh: 您有大便黏滞不爽、解不尽的感觉吗？

questions.text_en: Did you get constipated easily or have dry stools?
questions.text_zh: 您容易大便干燥吗？

questions.text_en: Did your tongue have a thick coating?
questions.text_zh: 您舌苔厚腻或有舌苔厚厚的感觉吗？

questions.text_en: Did urination feel hot or urine look dark?
questions.text_zh: 您小便时尿道有发热感、尿色浓（深）吗？

questions.text_en: Was vaginal discharge yellowish / scrotum wet?
questions.text_zh: 您带下色黄（限女性）/阴囊潮湿（限男性）吗？
